critical_failure: The diplomat's ship was impounded and the crew detained. All communication has been cut off.
A diplomatic incident escalated beyond recovery. Your representative was expelled under guard.
The faction's leadership took severe offence. Your diplomat barely escaped with their life.
failure: Talks broke down after the initial meeting. The faction showed no interest in further dialogue.
Your diplomat was received politely but firmly turned away. No agreements were reached.
A cultural misunderstanding torpedoed the negotiations before they could begin.
partial: Some progress was made, but the faction wants more concessions before committing.
Your diplomat secured a minor trade concession but the larger deal fell through.
Initial talks were positive. The faction is open to continuing discussions.
success: Negotiations were successful! The faction is pleased with the terms agreed upon.
Your diplomat charmed the faction leadership. A solid trade agreement is in place.
Excellent diplomatic work. Both sides are satisfied with the outcome.
exceptional: A historic agreement! The faction has offered exclusive trade rights and mutual defence.
Your diplomat impressed the faction so thoroughly they've offered an alliance.
Outstanding success — the faction is sending a reciprocal diplomatic envoy with gifts.

interception_outcomes: The ship was ambushed by pirates in a disputed corridor.
An uncharted debris field forced a dangerous detour through hostile space.
Faction patrol ships challenged the vessel's right of passage.

tier_1.description: Local broadcast — visible to nearby stations only

tier_2.description: Regional broadcast — visible to stations within 3 sectors

tier_3.description: Wide broadcast — visible across most of known space
